titleStmt.title: SII 11.47: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 47. (B.K. No. 111 of 1926-27). HOSŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE DURGAVVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Āhavamalladēva (Nūrmaḍi-Taila II). It records grants of garden-land at Eleya-Posavūru (i.e., modern Hosūr) made by Koṟalagunda,—the manneya of Muḷugunda Twelve and the Nāḷgāvuṇḍa (i.e., nāḍugāvuṇḍa) who belonged to the Sinda race and the Kunnala family and bore the snake-banner (nāga-dhvaja) and the tiger-crest (vyāghra-lāñchhana)—and the gāvuṇḍas of Muḷugunda Twelve, headed by Āycha-Gāvuṇḍa, for the benefit of the temple of Mūlasthānadēva at Posavūru. A certain Eṟeyamma-Gāvuṇḍa, gave land for vidyādāna, in the same temple. The Māhāsāmanta Śōbhanarasa (same as the Śōbhana of inscription No. 45 above) was then ruling over the Two Six-Hundred (divisions). He bore the epithets, Kannana-baṇṭa and Koṅkaṇa-bhayaṅkara.

The inscription is dated in Śaka year 915, Jaya, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti and solar eclipse. In Jaya, which corresponded to Śaka 916 according to the Southern cycle and to Śaka 915 according to the Northern cycle, there was no solar eclipse on the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti day which fell on Monday, December 24, A.D. 994. But there was a solar eclipse in this year on Pushya, ba. amāvāsyā, which corresponded to A.D. 995, January 4, Friday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṅgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarārambhamūlastaṁbhā
ya saṁbhavē . 1 namastasmai varāhāya līḷāyā caratē mahīṁ
khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ kaṇakaṇāyatē . 2 svasti samastabhuvanā
śraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadāhavamalladēvara rājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddha
mānamā candrārkkatārambaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigatapañcamahā
śabda mahāsāmantaṁ kannana baṇṭaṁ kaṭakaprākāraṁ nerevoḍebaṇṭaṁ giridurggamalla koṁkaṇa bhayaṁ
karaṁ nāmādisemastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmatsōbhanarasa reraḍaṟunūṟumaṁ sukhasaṁka
thāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire . svastiśrī sindakuḷōdbhavaṁ kunnalavaṁśapradīpakaṁ pannaga
dhvajavirājamānaṁ vyāghralāṁcchanaṁ pagevarabhīmaṁ subhaṭaṁkarāmaṁ muḷugundavidyādharaṁ
nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrī manmuḷugunda pa(ṁ)nneraḍaṟa manneyaṁ koṟalagundaṁ
svasti sakavarṣa 915 neya jayasaṁvatsaraṁ pravarttise tadvarṣābhyantarado ḷuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyuṁ
sūryyagrahaṇadandu muḷugunda panneraḍaṟoḷage veleyaposavūro ḷnāḷgāvuṇḍaṁ koṟalagundaṁ
tanna koḍaṁgeyyeraḍu tōṁṭakaṁ dṛvya pūrvvakaṁ goṇḍu muḷugunda pannaraḍaṟagāvuṇḍugaḷu(ṁ) māycagā
vuṇḍanuṁ purassaramāge vidyābharaṇapaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci muḷugundada dēvēśvaradēvara sannidhānadoḷ
posavūra mūlasthānadēvargge biṭṭa paṭṭavarddhanada tōṇṭa vondu tavarājada tōṇṭa vondu mūlasthānadēvargge
ṟeyammagāvuṇḍaṁ vidyādānakke biṭṭa kallabāviya tōṇṭa vondantu mūṟu tōṁṭakka mūṟu mattarkkisukā
ḍiṅga maruvaṇamanittuṇbarpanneraḍu tōṁṭakka koyloḷ poṁge pattu vīsavanuṇbarūroḷenitu tōṁṭavanita
rkke poṁge bēḷeyuṁ koyloḷaynū ṟeleya nuṇbarintī dharmmamaṁ kādu naḍeyisidaṁge vāraṇāsi ku
rukṣētra prayāge yargghyatīrttha gaṁge gaṅgāsāgaradoḷ sāsira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷa
gumaṁ pañcaratnadiṁ kaṭṭasi mahāritvijarkkaḷge yubhayamukhi koṭṭa phalavakku . Idanaḻida nā
kavileyuṁ brāhmaṇara neḻkōṭi tapōdhanaraṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷaḻida pañcamahāpātakara pōda lōka
kke pōpar(ḥ) © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu(ṁ) rnṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētāṁ bhāginaḥ
prārtthivēndrāḥ bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē (.) kṛmiḥ . na viṣaṁ viṣamittyāhuḥ dēvaśvaṁ viṣamuccya
tē viṣamēkākinaṁ hanti dēvaśvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . svastyanēkaguṇavipuḷadaḷavaḷaya vaḷayi
taṁ sattyasaucācāracāritraṁ nayavinayarārājitasarāgapuṁjapiṁjaritātiśayasīḷa karṇnikāḷaṁkritaṁ kaḷikāḷē
yakaḷaṁkapaṁkarahita manmunicaritaṁ kamaḷamadhyastitaṁ dēvadvijagurupādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ paranārīdū
raṁ vibudhajanādhāraṁ vinayāṁburāsi sōmēśvaradāsi sattyakānīnaṁ saucāṁjanēya nakaḷaṁkacaritaṁ sanmānadā
na vivēkabṛhaspati bhayalōbhavarjjita sakaḷaguṇasampūrṇnaṁ kalikālakarṇna namaḷacaritraṁ naḍunāḍatīrtthaṁ
śrī matposavūrāycagāvuṇḍaṁ . dharmmavicārada guṇada tavarmmane kalikāladharmmataneyaṁ saucakārmmanivanendu
palaruṁ nermmava rāycuga nidēṁ kṛtārtthanō jagadoḷ .
Digital edition of SII 11.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
